case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF FRANCISCO/TREASURE AND TAX VS. MARISOL SUAREZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-25-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-25-2016 BY DIANNE PEEBLES. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURE AND TAX COLLECTOR. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT MARISOL SUAREZ. PLAINTIFF STIPULATES TO HAVE MATTER HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANNE PEEBLES. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
